messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: `./start-swarm.sh` / `./swarm ensure` must bring up the full stack (agents + handoffd + operator + Telegram front desk), pass the swarm gates, and be documented
How it works: A cold start via start-swarm.sh brings up agents and every ancillary

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-461 - `./start-swarm.sh` / `./swarm ensure` must bring up the full stack (agents + handoffd + operator + Telegram front desk), pass the swarm gates, and be documented is complete.
